story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_0100_10:
So, you want to learn more about
Mega Evolution?
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_0300_10:
Diantha told me something after seeing my
Arceus Cup battle against Korrina.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_0400_10:
She said what decided the battle was our
experience using Mega Evolution.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_0500_10: I see. So Diantha recommended you see me.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_0700_10:
I don’t want my lack of knowledge to
disappoint Alakazam any more than I
already have.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_1000_10:
Besides, I’m sure learning more about
Mega Evolution will help you awaken
your arc suit!
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_1200_10:
The key to Mega Evolution is a strong bond
between Trainer and Pokémon!
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_1300_10:
If you deepen your understanding of
Mega Evolution, maybe you’ll demonstrate
the bond Arceus is looking for!
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_1600_10:
I’ll master Mega Evolution. And next time,
I’ll finally—
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_1800_10:
As someone who studies Mega Evolution,
I must warn you.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2000_10:
there are times it can be a heavy burden
for Pokémon.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2200_10:
You shouldn’t focus solely on winning or
getting stronger.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2300_10: That’s the lesson it teaches us.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2500_10:
As of yet, there have been no cases of them
in pain.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2600_10:
But apparently, Mega-Evolved Alakazam
trade even the smallest amount of muscle
for psychic energy.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2700_10:
As a result, their precognition grows even
stronger.
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_2900_10:
(Diantha said our gap in experience decided
the battle.)
story_arceus_09_04000/2401_1001_3000_10: (I think I know what I need.)
